action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of best.pt + m1.pt achieved 0.8595 (new best!). Many-shot 0.92, few-shot 0.80. Analysis: Ensembling helps. ~2.58h remaining, 15 iters. Could train a third model with different seed or arch (e.g., ConvNeXt-Small or different aug) and add to ensemble. ConvNeXt-Tiny took ~270s for 18 epochs. Decision: Train a third ConvNeXt-Tiny with different seed and EMA, save as m2.pt, then ensemble all three.
action.command: SEED=123 EPOCHS=18 LR=1e-4 LA_TAU=1.0 SAVE_NAME=m2.pt python train.py
